template.description: Master datalake ingest template. CRM Dynamics 365 discovery: the flow must include six RouteOnAttribute branches and six PutDatabaseRecord UPSERT processors for data_type values from crm-dynamics-discovery.py; copy-ready property names and EL expressions are in datalake/SQL/CRM/NiFi-scope-note.md. JsonTreeReader schema text: datalake/SQL/json_schemas/CRM/crm-dynamics-discovery.json.
template.name: nifi-collect-data-from-source-all

entry.value: INSERT INTO public.veeam_proxy_datastores (proxy_id, source_ip, datastore_id, collection_time) VALUES ('${proxy_id}', '${source_ip}', '${datastore_id}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.key: Log level when file not found
Log level when file not found

value.name: Log level when file not found

entry.key: Log level when file not found

entry.value:
import re from org.apache.nifi.processor.io import StreamCallback from org.apache.nifi.processor.exception import ProcessException from java.nio.charset import StandardCharsets from org.apache.commons.io import IOUtils import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
class XMLToSQLProcessor(StreamCallback): def process(self, inputStream, outputStream): try: # Read flowfile as UTF-8 xml_content = IOUtils.toString(inputStream, "UTF-8")
# Remove BOM if present and strip leading/trailing whitespace xml_content = xml_content.encode('utf-8').decode('utf-8-sig').strip()
# Remove the <?xml ... ?> declaration if present xml_content = re.sub(r"<\?xml.*?\?>", "", xml_content).strip()
# Check if content is valid XML if not xml_content.startswith("<"): raise ProcessException("Invalid XML content: Missing root element.")
# Parse XML root = ET.fromstring(xml_content)
# Extract attributes from <diskStatsColl> timestamp = root.attrib.get("timestamp", "Not Found") node_id = root.attrib.get("id", "Not Found") contains_attr = root.attrib.get("contains", "") sql_statements = []
if contains_attr == "nodeStats": for node in root.findall(".//node"): sql_insert = ( "INSERT INTO IBM_Storage_node_io (node_id, timestamp, cluster, node_id_hex, cluster_id, " "ro, wo, rb, lrb, wb, lwb, \"re\", \"we\", rq, wq) VALUES " "('{node_id}', '{timestamp}', '{cluster}', '{node_id_hex}', '{cluster_id}', {ro}, {wo}, " "{rb}, {lrb}, {wb}, {lwb}, {re}, {we}, {rq}, {wq});" ).format( node_id=node_id, timestamp=timestamp, cluster=node.get("cluster", "NULL"), node_id_hex=node.get("node_id", "NULL"), cluster_id=node.get("cluster_id", "NULL"), ro=node.get("ro", "0"), wo=node.get("wo", "0"), rb=node.get("rb", "0"), lrb=node.get("lrb", "0"), wb=node.get("wb", "0"), lwb=node.get("lwb", "0"), re=node.get("re", "0"), we=node.get("we", "0"), rq=node.get("rq", "0"), wq=node.get("wq", "0") ) sql_statements.append(sql_insert)
elif contains_attr == "driveStats": for mdsk in root.findall(".//mdsk"): sql_insert = ( "INSERT INTO IBM_Storage_drive_io (node_id, timestamp, idx, ro, wo, rb, wb, re, we, rq, wq, pre, pwe) VALUES " "('{node_id}', '{timestamp}', {idx}, {ro}, {wo}, {rb}, {wb}, {re}, {we}, {rq}, {wq}, {pre}, {pwe});" ).format( node_id=node_id, timestamp=timestamp, idx=mdsk.get("idx", "NULL"), ro=mdsk.get("ro", "0"), wo=mdsk.get("wo", "0"), rb=mdsk.get("rb", "0"), wb=mdsk.get("wb", "0"), re=mdsk.get("re", "0"), we=mdsk.get("we", "0"), rq=mdsk.get("rq", "0"), wq=mdsk.get("wq", "0"), pre=mdsk.get("pre", "0"), pwe=mdsk.get("pwe", "0") ) sql_statements.append(sql_insert)
elif contains_attr in ("mdiskStats", "managedDiskStats"): for mdsk in root.findall(".//mdsk"): sql_insert = ( "INSERT INTO IBM_Storage_mdsk_io (node_id, timestamp, id, ro, wo, rb, wb, re, we, rq, wq, pre, pwe, ure, uwe, urq, uwq) VALUES " "('{node_id}', '{timestamp}','{id}', {ro}, {wo}, {rb}, {wb}, {re}, {we}, {rq}, {wq}, {pre}, {pwe}, {ure}, {uwe}, {urq}, {uwq});" ).format( node_id=node_id, timestamp=timestamp, id=mdsk.get("id", "NULL"), ro=mdsk.get("ro", "0"), wo=mdsk.get("wo", "0"), rb=mdsk.get("rb", "0"), wb=mdsk.get("wb", "0"), re=mdsk.get("re", "0"), we=mdsk.get("we", "0"), rq=mdsk.get("rq", "0"), wq=mdsk.get("wq", "0"), pre=mdsk.get("pre", "0"), pwe=mdsk.get("pwe", "0"), ure=mdsk.get("ure", "0"), uwe=mdsk.get("puwewe", "0"), urq=mdsk.get("urq", "0"), uwq=mdsk.get("uwq", "0") ) sql_statements.append(sql_insert)
elif contains_attr == "virtualDiskStats": for vdsk in root.findall(".//vdsk"): sql_insert = ( "INSERT INTO IBM_Storage_vdsk_io (node_id, timestamp, id, ro, wo, rb, wb, re, we, rq, wq, rxl, wxl, rl, wl, rlw, wlw) VALUES " "('{node_id}', '{timestamp}', '{id}', {ro}, {wo}, {rb}, {wb}, {re}, {we}, {rq}, {wq}, {rxl}, {wxl}, {rl}, {wl}, {rlw}, {wlw} );" ).format( node_id=node_id, timestamp=timestamp, id=vdsk.get("id", "NULL"), ro=vdsk.get("ro", "0"), wo=vdsk.get("wo", "0"), rb=vdsk.get("rb", "0"), wb=vdsk.get("wb", "0"), re=vdsk.get("re", "0"), we=vdsk.get("we", "0"), rq=vdsk.get("rq", "0"), wq=vdsk.get("wq", "0"), rxl=vdsk.get("rxl", "0"), wxl=vdsk.get("wxl", "0"), rl=vdsk.get("rl", "0"), wl=vdsk.get("wl", "0"), rlw=vdsk.get("rlw", "0"), wlw=vdsk.get("wlw", "0") ) sql_statements.append(sql_insert)
else: sql_statements.append("/* Unknown XML type */")
# Write SQL statements to output outputStream.write("\n".join(sql_statements).encode("UTF-8"))
except Exception as e: raise ProcessException("Error processing XML: " + str(e))
# Process the FlowFile in NiFi flowFile = session.get() if flowFile is not None: flowFile = session.write(flowFile, XMLToSQLProcessor()) session.transfer(flowFile, REL_SUCCESS)

entry.value:
{ "namespace": "com.bulutistan", "type": "record", "name": "DeviceTypeRecord", "fields": [ { "name": "id", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "url", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "display_url", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "display", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "manufacturer_id", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "manufacturer_name", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "manufacturer_slug", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "default_platform_id", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "default_platform_name", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "model", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "slug", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "part_number", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "u_height", "type": ["null","double"], "default": null },
{ "name": "exclude_from_utilization", "type": ["null","boolean"], "default": null }, { "name": "is_full_depth", "type": ["null","boolean"], "default": null }, { "name": "subdevice_role", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "airflow", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "weight", "type": ["null","double"], "default": null }, { "name": "weight_unit", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "front_image", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rear_image", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "description", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "comments", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "tags", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null }, { "name": "custom_fields", "type": ["null","string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "created", "type": ["null", { "type": "long", "logicalType": "timestamp-millis" }], "default": null }, { "name": "last_updated", "type": ["null", { "type": "long", "logicalType": "timestamp-millis" }], "default": null },
{ "name": "device_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "console_port_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "console_server_port_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "power_port_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "power_outlet_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "interface_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "front_port_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "rear_port_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "device_bay_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "module_bay_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null }, { "name": "inventory_item_template_count", "type": ["null","long"], "default": null } ] }

# Gerekli kütüphaneler from org.apache.nifi.processor.io import StreamCallback from org.apache.commons.io import IOUtils from java.time import ZonedDateTime, ZoneId from java.time.format import DateTimeFormatter import re # Özel karakterleri kaldırmak için
# Cluster verilerini ayrıştıran güncellenmiş fonksiyon def parse_cluster_data(cluster_data): clusters = [] current_cluster = {}
# Veriyi satırlara ayır lines = cluster_data.strip().splitlines()
for line in lines: if line.startswith('Datacenter:'): if current_cluster: clusters.append(current_cluster) # Önceki kümeyi ekle # Yeni bir küme başlat current_cluster = {'datacenter': line.split(":")[1].strip()} elif ':' in line: # Diğer kolonları dinamik olarak ekle, özel karakterleri sil ve boşlukları "_" ile değiştir key, value = line.split(":", 1) formatted_key = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s]', '', key.strip()).replace(" ", "_").lower() # Özel karakterleri sil, boşlukları "_" yap current_cluster[formatted_key] = value.strip().strip('"')
# Son kümeyi ekle if current_cluster: clusters.append(current_cluster)
return clusters
# SQL insert sorgusunu oluşturan fonksiyon def generate_insert_sql(cluster_data): # Zaman damgası oluştur time = ZonedDateTime.now(ZoneId.of("Europe/Istanbul")) collection_time = time.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss Z"))
# SQL komutunun başı base_sql = "INSERT INTO vmhost_metrics (" column_names = [] values_list = []
# Her küme için kolon ve değerleri topla for cluster in cluster_data: columns = [] values = [] # Dinamik olarak kolon ve değerleri topla for key, value in cluster.items(): columns.append(key) stripped_value = value.strip() if not stripped_value: values.append('NULL') else: values.append("'{}'".format(stripped_value.replace("'", "''"))) # Tek tırnakları kaçar
# Tekli sorgu formatına getir for col in columns: if col not in column_names: column_names.append(col) # Tekrarları önle values_list.append("({})".format(", ".join(values)))
# Kolonları ve değerleri birleşmiş SQL komutuna ekle sql = "{}{}) VALUES {};".format(base_sql, ", ".join(column_names), ", ".join(values_list)) return sql
# Akış işlemini yöneten sınıf class PyStreamCallback(StreamCallback): def __init__(self, table_name): self.table_name = table_name # Tablo adı veya veri içeriği
def process(self, inputStream, outputStream): # Gelen veriyi oku (UTF-8 kodlaması) input_text = IOUtils.toString(inputStream, 'utf-8')
# Cluster verisini ayrıştır parsed_clusters = parse_cluster_data(input_text)
# SQL insert sorgusunu oluştur sql_statement = generate_insert_sql(parsed_clusters)
# SQL sorgusunu çıktı akışına yaz outputStream.write(sql_statement.encode('utf-8'))
# Akış dosyasını işle flow_file = session.get()
if flow_file is not None: table_name = "vmhost_metrics"
# Akış dosyasını işle ve SQL sorgusunu üret session.write(flow_file, PyStreamCallback(table_name))
# Akış dosyasını sonraki işlemciye aktar session.transfer(flow_file, REL_SUCCESS)

entry.key: Log level when file not found

value.name: Log level when file not found

entry.key: Log level when file not found

entry.value:
# Gerekli kütüphaneler from org.apache.nifi.processor.io import StreamCallback from org.apache.commons.io import IOUtils from java.time import ZonedDateTime, ZoneId from java.time.format import DateTimeFormatter import re # Özel karakterleri kaldırmak için
# Cluster verilerini ayrıştıran güncellenmiş fonksiyon def parse_cluster_data(cluster_data): clusters = [] current_cluster = {}
# Veriyi satırlara ayır lines = cluster_data.strip().splitlines()
for line in lines: if line.startswith('Datacenter:'): if current_cluster: clusters.append(current_cluster) # Önceki kümeyi ekle # Yeni bir küme başlat current_cluster = {'datacenter': line.split(":")[1].strip()} elif ':' in line: # Diğer kolonları dinamik olarak ekle, özel karakterleri sil ve boşlukları "_" ile değiştir key, value = line.split(":", 1) formatted_key = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s]', '', key.strip()).replace(" ", "_").lower() # Özel karakterleri sil, boşlukları "_" yap current_cluster[formatted_key] = value.strip().strip('"')
# Son kümeyi ekle if current_cluster: clusters.append(current_cluster)
return clusters
# SQL insert sorgusunu oluşturan fonksiyon def generate_insert_sql(cluster_data): # Zaman damgası oluştur time = ZonedDateTime.now(ZoneId.of("Europe/Istanbul")) collection_time = time.format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss Z"))
# SQL komutunun başı base_sql = "INSERT INTO cluster_metrics (" column_names = [] values_list = []
# Her küme için kolon ve değerleri topla for cluster in cluster_data: columns = [] values = [] # Dinamik olarak kolon ve değerleri topla for key, value in cluster.items(): columns.append(key) values.append(value.replace("'", "''")) # Tek tırnakları kaçar
# Tekli sorgu formatına getir for col in columns: if col not in column_names: column_names.append(col) # Tekrarları önle values_list.append("({})".format(", ".join("'{}'".format(v) for v in values)))
# Kolonları ve değerleri birleşmiş SQL komutuna ekle sql = "{}{}) VALUES {};".format(base_sql, ", ".join(column_names), ", ".join(values_list)) return sql
# Akış işlemini yöneten sınıf class PyStreamCallback(StreamCallback): def __init__(self, table_name): self.table_name = table_name # Tablo adı veya veri içeriği
def process(self, inputStream, outputStream): # Gelen veriyi oku (UTF-8 kodlaması) input_text = IOUtils.toString(inputStream, 'utf-8')
# Cluster verisini ayrıştır parsed_clusters = parse_cluster_data(input_text)
# SQL insert sorgusunu oluştur sql_statement = generate_insert_sql(parsed_clusters)
# SQL sorgusunu çıktı akışına yaz outputStream.write(sql_statement.encode('utf-8'))
# Akış dosyasını işle flow_file = session.get()
if flow_file is not None: table_name = "cluster_metrics"
# Akış dosyasını işle ve SQL sorgusunu üret session.write(flow_file, PyStreamCallback(table_name))
# Akış dosyasını sonraki işlemciye aktar session.transfer(flow_file, REL_SUCCESS)

entry.value:
{ "namespace": "com.bulutistan.panduit.pdu", "type": "record", "name": "PanduitPduRecord", "doc": "Zabbix'ten toplanan tüm Panduit PDU veri türlerini kapsayan birleşik şema.", "fields": [ { "name": "collection_timestamp", "type": { "type": "long", "logicalType": "timestamp-millis" }, "doc": "Verinin toplandığı zaman damgası"}, { "name": "pdu_id", "type": "string", "doc": "Zabbix'teki host ID" }, { "name": "pdu_name", "type": "string", "doc": "PDU cihazının adı" }, { "name": "zabbix_host_name", "type": "string", "doc": "Zabbix'te tanımlı host adı" }, { "name": "data_type", "type": "string", "doc": "Kaydın türünü belirten alan (örn: pdu_inventory)" },
{ "name": "breaker_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "device_model", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "door_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "dry_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "firmware_version", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "hardware_version", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "hid_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "humidity_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "input_phase_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "outlet_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rope_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "spot_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "system_name", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "temperature_count", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "location", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rack_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "pdu_index", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "frequency", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "frequency_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "phase_total_current", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "power_factor", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "power_va", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "power_var", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "power_watts", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "resettable_energy", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "total_energy", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "function_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "function_upstream_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "input", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "operation_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "pdu_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "temperature_scale", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "door_sensor_11_state", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "door_sensor_11_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "door_sensor_12_state", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "door_sensor_12_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "dry_sensor_11_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "dry_sensor_12_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rope_sensor_11_state", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rope_sensor_11_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rope_sensor_12_state", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "rope_sensor_12_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "spot_sensor_11_state", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "spot_sensor_11_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "spot_sensor_12_state", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "spot_sensor_12_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "breaker_index", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "breaker_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "current", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "current_percent_load", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "current_rating", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "voltage", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "phase_index", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "outlet_index", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "control_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "control_switchable", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "watts", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "wh", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "hid_index", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "aisle", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "auto_lock_time", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "door_open_time", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "handle_operation", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "hid_aisle_control", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "max_door_open_time", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "mechanical_lock", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "user_pin_length", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "user_pin_mode", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
{ "name": "sensor_id", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "value", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null }, { "name": "th_status", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null } ] }

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

value.name: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

entry.key: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

value.name: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern
Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern
Log level when file not found

value.name: Log level when file not found

entry.key: Log level when file not found

entry.value:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*- # # NiFi ExecuteScript (Jython) – inserts strictly into public.zabbix_veeam_data # from org.apache.nifi.processor.io import StreamCallback from org.apache.commons.io import IOUtils from java.time import ZonedDateTime, ZoneId from java.time.format import DateTimeFormatter import unicodedata import re
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Sabitler # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- TABLE_NAME = "public.zabbix_veeam_data" # ⇦ başka tabloya izin yok
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Yardımcı fonksiyonlar # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- def normalize_text(text): return unicodedata.normalize('NFKC', text)
def sanitize_value(value): if value: value = normalize_text(value) # Unicode normalizasyonu value = re.sub(r'[^\x00-\x7F]', '', value) # Non-ASCII ayıklama value = value.replace("'", "''") # Tek tırnak kaçışlama return value return None # NULL olarak işlenecek
def parse_cluster_data(cluster_data): """ CLI çıktısını satır satır dolaşır, kümeleri sözlük hâline getirir. """ clusters = [] current = {} for line in cluster_data.strip().splitlines(): if line.startswith('Datacenter:'): if current: clusters.append(current) current = {'datacenter': line.split(':', 1)[1].strip()} elif ':' in line: k, v = line.split(':', 1) k = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s]', '', k.strip()).replace(' ', '_').lower() current[k] = sanitize_value(v.strip().strip('"')) if current: clusters.append(current) return clusters
def generate_insert_sql(clusters): """ Tek bir INSERT ... VALUES ... komutu döndürür. """ now = ZonedDateTime.now(ZoneId.of("Europe/Istanbul")).format( DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss Z"))
# Tüm kümelerdeki alanları birleşik sütun listesine topla col_set = set() for c in clusters: col_set.update(c.keys()) columns = sorted(col_set) columns.insert(0, "collection_time") # toplama zamanı her satırda sabit
# Her küme için değer dizisini oluştur value_rows = [] for c in clusters: row = ["'{}'".format(now)] # collection_time for col in columns[1:]: val = c.get(col) row.append("NULL" if val is None else "'{}'".format(val)) value_rows.append("({})".format(", ".join(row)))
sql = "INSERT INTO {} ({}) VALUES {};".format( TABLE_NAME, ", ".join(columns), ", ".join(value_rows)) return sql
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # StreamCallback # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- class PyStreamCallback(StreamCallback): def process(self, inputStream, outputStream): try: raw_text = IOUtils.toString(inputStream, "utf-8") except Exception as e: raise ValueError("Input stream okunamadı: {}".format(e))
clusters = parse_cluster_data(raw_text) sql_stmt = generate_insert_sql(clusters) outputStream.write(sql_stmt.encode("utf-8"))
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # NiFi akış işlemleri # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- flow_file = session.get() if flow_file is not None: session.write(flow_file, PyStreamCallback()) session.transfer(flow_file, REL_SUCCESS)
